Interface InputHandler.SinglePlayerCallbacks

Enclosing class:
InputHandler
public static interface InputHandler.SinglePlayerCallbacks
Callback interface for single player actions. Defines methods that the InputHandler can call to execute game actions and query game state in single player mode.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    InputEventListener
    getEventListener()
    Gets the event listener for processing game move events.
    javafx.animation.Timeline
    getTimeline()
    Gets the timeline used for controlling game speed and soft drop rate.
    boolean
    isGameOver()
    Checks if the game is over.
    boolean

    Checks if the game has started.
    boolean
    isPaused()
    Checks if the game is currently paused.
    void
    moveDown(MoveEvent event)
    Moves the current piece down by one unit.
    void
    newGame()
    Resets and starts a completely new game.
    void
    pauseGame()
    Toggles the pause state of the game.
    void
    playLineClear()
    Plays the line clear sound effect.
    void

    Refreshes the brick display with updated view data.
    void
    showNotification(String message)
    Displays a notification message to the player.
    void
    startGame()
    Starts a new game session.
    void
    updateTimelineRate()
    Updates the timeline rate to normal speed (resets soft drop rate).

  • Method Details

    • getEventListener

      InputEventListener getEventListener()
      Gets the event listener for processing game move events.
      Returns:
      The InputEventListener instance for single player mode

    • getTimeline

      javafx.animation.Timeline getTimeline()
      Gets the timeline used for controlling game speed and soft drop rate.
      Returns:
      The Timeline instance controlling game animation speed

    • isPaused

      boolean isPaused()
      Checks if the game is currently paused.
      Returns:
      True if the game is paused, false otherwise

    • isGameOver

      boolean isGameOver()
      Checks if the game is over.
      Returns:
      True if the game is over, false otherwise

    • isGameStarted

      boolean isGameStarted()
      Checks if the game has started.
      Returns:
      True if the game has started, false if it's in initial/ready state

    • refreshBrick

      void refreshBrick(ViewData viewData)
      Refreshes the brick display with updated view data.
      Parameters:
      viewData - The updated view data containing brick position and state

    • moveDown

      void moveDown(MoveEvent event)
      Moves the current piece down by one unit.
      Parameters:
      event - The move event containing event type and source information

    • pauseGame

      void pauseGame()
      Toggles the pause state of the game.

    • startGame

      void startGame()
      Starts a new game session.

    • newGame

      void newGame()
      Resets and starts a completely new game.

    • showNotification

      void showNotification(String message)
      Displays a notification message to the player.
      Parameters:
      message - The message to display

    • playLineClear

      void playLineClear()
      Plays the line clear sound effect.

    • updateTimelineRate

      void updateTimelineRate()
      Updates the timeline rate to normal speed (resets soft drop rate).
